description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (final_images, dependency_images) and platform‑specific tags for amd64, arm64 and armv7 runners. In the final_images stage define .build_and_deploy jobs (build_and_deploy_amd64, build_and_deploy_arm64, build_and_deploy_armv7, build_and_deploy_with_ruby_amd64) that export IMAGE_TAG and DOCKERFILE variables, pull latest builder and ruby images, optionally generate Dockerfiles, build a ruby image when BUILD_RUBY_IMAGE=true, then build the builder image and the final image using docker build $DOCKER_EXTRA_ARGS with cache‑from arguments and push all tags to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE. Also in final_images define .test_build jobs (test_build_amd64, test_build_arm64, test_build_armv7, test_build_with_ruby_amd64) that export DOCKERFILE, generate Dockerfiles, copy listed files into a .build directory, build staging builder and ruby images with docker build, push them, and archive the .build directory as an artifact that expires in 5 days. In the dependency_images stage define .dep_build and .dep_build_armv7 jobs that generate builder Dockerfiles, pull existing builder caches, build and push builder images, and .test_dep_build and .test_dep_build_armv7 jobs that perform the same steps for staging‑builders. All jobs use rules that trigger on PIPELINE_TYPE matching canonical or mirror tag pipelines, retry once, disable armv7 jobs when $DISABLE_RPI_BUILDS is true, and rely on Docker cache‑from rather than explicit GitLab caches.
